about.text: PhD student in Industrial and Systems Engineering with focus on use of computer vision and reinforcement learning for pre-and post-disaster evacuation, and transportation. I also hold an MS degree in Computer Science and possess five years of experience in microservices development. I am actively seeking internship opportunities to leverage cross-domain expertise to optimize products and services. Committed to continuous learning and contributing to the team's growth.
